expectations.evidence: generateReport spans lines 163-201 = 39 lines (including destructuring, comments, blanks). Exceeds 30-line limit.
filterOrders, sortOrders, computeAggregates, appendChartData, and all formatters (lines 86-135) are pure functions with zero I/O.
Fetch (fetchUser/fetchOrders), calculate (computeAggregates), format (formatters record), cache/email at boundary — each concern in its own function.
12 original args replaced with single `options: ReportOptions` (line 163).
generateReport returns the report string (query). Email sending is a conditional side effect at the boundary, separated from pure computation.
No classes or inheritance. Pure function pipeline: filter -> sort -> aggregate -> format. Factory function returns plain object.
Explicit interfaces for all contracts: ReportOptions, ReportData, ReportFormat, SortField, Order, User, DbClient, CacheClient, Logger, Mailer, Compressor (lines 14-56).
`createReportService(deps: ReportDependencies)` on line 142 injects all I/O deps (db, cache, logger, mailer, gzip). Exported on line 206. No hard imports.
